name: list-item
description: Pressable list row with title, subtitle, leading and trailing slots, and separator

props.name: title
props.description: Primary label text of the list item.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional secondary description text displayed below the title.

props.name: leading
props.description: Optional element rendered on the left side (e.g. icon, avatar).

props.name: trailing
props.description: Optional element rendered on the right side (e.g. chevron, switch, badge). Defaults to a chevron.

props.name: separator
props.description: When true, renders a hairline separator below the row.
